subject: [PORTAL ] Non-root user DB access from WMS
commit_message:
[PORTAL ] Non-root user DB access from WMS

Update portal-widget HELM charts to use non-
root user access to the portal mariadb
backend

Issue-ID: OOM-2601
Signed-off-by: SandeepLinux <ss048t@att.com>
Change-Id: I434ce85f1d0922d87fca35f692064a9b5e757954
Signed-off-by: Sylvain Desbureaux <sylvain.desbureaux@orange.com>

> > @Sandeep, are you OK with this change?
> > @Krzysztof, can you review?
> 
> Thank you very much Sylvain! I am still learning...I am sorry for not including secrets.yaml in the templates folder for portal-widge component. I would very much appreciate if you please let me know how this helps in the overall HELM charts configuration. Extremely sorry for my ignorance...Thank you!

No problem for the secret part :)
All "secrets" from secrets list in values.yaml must eventually be created.
There are two options:

* it refers to a another secret, so here the template "common.secret.envFromSecretFast" will refer to this one (here no need for secret.yaml)
* it doesn't exist yet and secret.yaml file with the template "common.secretFast" will create it for us with the values given in the list
